data.title: CoinShares stock debuts on Nasdaq after SPAC merger. European crypto asset manager's shares set to trade amidst market challenges.
data.description: Today, the European crypto asset manager will commence trading shares, signifying a transition in venue as digital asset firms adapt to a challenging market environment.

data.title: Australia approves bill forcing crypto platforms to get licenses, regulating exchanges & custodians.
data.description: In Australia, a recent legislative measure mandates that cryptocurrency exchanges and custodians must secure financial services licenses. This decision comes as the country aims to regulate digital asset platforms more effectively. The new law impacts a significant number of crypto businesses operating in Australia and underscores the government's commitment to overseeing the emerging crypto sector.

data.title: Jetsetter Guide Launches Lake Tahoe Tidal Prediction System Ahead of Summer Season
data.description: Jetsetter Guide has introduced the Lake Tahoe Tidal Prediction System, a new tool consisting of free interactive tide charts, facilitating safer planning for boaters and swimmers on the renowned alpine lake in Incline Village, Nevada. Launched on April 1, 2026, this system offers detailed data covering five key areas on the lake. This resource aims to enhance safety measures for water-related activities by providing users with accurate information to navigate tides effectively.

data.title: Jumptuit Awarded Trademarks in Canada
data.description: Canada has recently approved trademarks for the Jumptuit logo and brand, joining the United States, European Union, China, India, Japan, Hong Kong, United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates, and Switzerland in recognizing the brand. This development was announced on April 1, 2026, without specifying the exact number of countries approving the trademark.

data.title: InTest Promotes Rich Rogoff to Chief Executive Officer
data.description: InTest Corporation, a leading provider of test and process technology solutions in various industries such as Semiconductor, Auto/EV, Defense/Aerospace, Industrial, Life Sciences, and Safety/Security, has appointed Rich Rogoff as the President and Chief Executive Officer. Rogoff, who currently serves as the Division President of InTest's Environmental Technologies Division, will now lead the company's overall operations. InTest Corporation is listed on the NYSE American under the ticker symbol INTT.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Fall Below $100; Trump To Speak To Nation On Iran War
data.description: President Trump is considering withdrawing from a potential war with Iran, even if the vital oil trade route, the Strait of Hormuz, remains closed. The stock market experienced a significant increase with Dow Jones futures rising, while oil prices showed a varied trend. Oil prices dropped below $100 per barrel in reaction to the news. Trump is scheduled to address the nation regarding the situation with Iran in the near future.

data.title: SPARC AI Expands Overwatch Distribution with App Launch and Indian Defence Trial Engagement
data.description: Drone manufacturers globally can now easily connect to Overwatch in less than 60 seconds. This development allows a swift and efficient connection process for drone manufacturers on a global scale.

data.title: OROCO ANNOUNCES RESIGNATION OF CEO
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada, on March 30, 2026, Oroco Resource Corp. (TSX-V: OCO, OTC: ORRCF) declared the departure of Richard Lock from his roles as Chief Executive Officer and director of the company, citing personal reasons. Lock's resignation will take effect on April 30, 2026.
Poll: Euro forecast to trade at $1.16 in three months, $1.18 in six, and $1.20 in a year (vs $1.19, $1.20, and $1.21 respectively in the March poll)

data.title: Scinai Reports Full-Year 2025 Results, with CDMO Revenues Doubling and Strategic Expansion Through Recipharm Collaboration
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Jerusalem, Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. (NASDAQ: SCNI) announced its unique business strategy, blending research and development with contract development and manufacturing operations to drive innovation while generating revenue. This biopharmaceutical company aims to revolutionize the industry by merging cutting-edge therapies with profitable drug production.

data.title: PMET Resources Submits Environmental and Social Impact Assessment (ESIA) for the Shaakichiuwaanaan CV5 Lithium Project to Federal and Provincial Governments
data.description: On April 1, 2026, PMET Resources submitted its Environmental and Social Impact Assessment (ESIA) for the Shaakichiuwaanaan CV5 Lithium Project in Sydney, Australia. This submission is considered the most significant milestone for the company.

data.title: Medicus Pharma Ltd Clarifies Positive SkinJect Phase 2 Dataset
data.description: The guidance on interpreting the Topline dataset emphasizes the importance of focusing on drug-driven efficacy in non-melanoma skin cancer. This information is key for understanding how effective the drug is in treating this specific type of cancer. It sheds light on the significance of analyzing the data in detail to assess the impact of the drug on patients. This reaffirms the commitment to prioritizing the evaluation of drug performance in combatting non-melanoma skin cancer.

data.title: Dyne Therapeutics Announces Participation at 2026 Academy of Managed Care Pharmacy (AMCP) Conference to Begin Shaping Access in US for Potential Neuromuscular Medicines
data.description: A poster disclosed promising findings from the DELIVER clinical trial for Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD) to managed care professionals. The trial showcased notable advancements in functional outcomes, highlighting the measurable impact on patients. The detailed presentation resonated with experts, underlining the positive implications of the results. The insights shared shed light on the robust improvements observed in clinical measures, emphasizing the tangible benefits for individuals with DMD. This information provides a valuable perspective on the effectiveness of the trial, with implications for future advancements in managing DMD.

data.title: Almadex Provides New Hope Drilling, Big Sky Project and General Exploration Update
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 1, 2026, Almadex Minerals Ltd. announced updates on its 2026 exploration program. The company, listed on the TSX-V as "DEX," shared positive developments regarding the program.
